_comment: EXAMPLE config — copy to gardener.config.json (same directory) and edit for your workspace. Every workspace-specific value the skill needs lives here; nothing workspace-specific belongs in SKILL.md prose. Keep your real gardener.config.json out of version control if it names real projects/teams you don't want public (same treatment as skills/assign/roster.json).

target._comment: fuzzy project/board name used when <target> isn't passed on the CLI; leave null to require --target every run

initiative_map._comment: destination project name -> initiative name; omit an entry to skip initiative wiring for that project

auth._comment: env var NAMES only, resolved the same way skills/assign/assign.py resolves them -- never put an actual key or a path to one here
